notes: The stillHORIZ3N version of Clockwork Infinity. Same structural story, 'torch' instead of 'frequency' in the verse — the SH album is quieter/reflective. Reduced intensity; softer emphasis on all key moments. Still centered on 'whispers of infinity' as the gravity center but as a whisper not a shout.

chunks.note: Quarter — single word held, quieter on SH
Been carrying the torch — reflective, cooler than rr-1's 'frequency'
the -ed flurry — preserved, but cooler tone
but I cant help where it led — reckoning, warmth returns
whispers of infinity #3 — the centerpiece, biggest on this quieter version
kick to a drum — softer close than rr-1
